description: OPERATION VANGUARD: Critical tech debt elimination and foundational model creation prior to the World Simulation engine. Based on State of the Union deep-scan findings.

techContext.conventions: Domain layer MUST NOT import from API layer. Schemas must be modularized by context. shadcn/ui + Tailwind only.

userStories.title: Refactor: Split schemas.py - Character & Narrative
userStories.description: Deconstruct the 3700-line God class. Start with character and narrative domains.
acceptanceCriteria: Create directory: src/api/schemas/
Create src/api/schemas/__init__.py with re-exports for backward compatibility
Create src/api/schemas/character_schemas.py - move CharacterPsychologySchema, CharacterGoalSchema, CharacterMemorySchema, CharacterProfileSchema, CharacterGenerationResponse
Create src/api/schemas/narrative_schemas.py - move narrative streaming schemas (22 schemas, ~1219 lines)
Update imports in affected routers: characters.py, dialogue.py, narratives.py
Test: pytest tests/ passes
userStories.investigationNotes: 95 schemas total across 10 domains. Character (7 schemas, 398 lines), Narrative Streaming (22 schemas, 1219 lines). Minimal cross-dependencies.

userStories.title: Refactor: Split schemas.py - World & Knowledge
userStories.description: Continue schema modularization for remaining domains.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/api/schemas/world_schemas.py - move factions, locations, rules, simulation schemas (21 schemas, ~231 lines)
Create src/api/schemas/knowledge_schemas.py - move RAG, chat, smart tagging schemas (8 schemas, ~1124 lines)
Create src/api/schemas/common_schemas.py - move pagination, error responses, health check schemas
Delete original src/api/schemas.py (after migration complete)
Update all remaining router imports
Test: pytest tests/ passes
userStories.investigationNotes: World Simulation has 21 schemas but well-structured. Smart Tagging has 8 schemas in 1124 lines - complex but cohesive.

userStories.title: Architecture: Fix Domain Import Violations
userStories.description: Fix 4 schema import violations where domain layer imports from API layer.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/contexts/character/domain/value_objects/character_generation_response.py with domain equivalent of CharacterGenerationResponse
Create src/contexts/story/domain/value_objects/scene_generation_response.py with domain equivalent of SceneGenerationResponse
Update src/contexts/character/infrastructure/generators/llm_character_generator.py to use domain value object
Update src/contexts/story/application/ports/scene_generator_port.py to use domain value object
Update src/contexts/story/application/services/scene_service.py to use domain value object
Update src/contexts/story/infrastructure/generators/llm_scene_generator.py to use domain value object
Update src/api/schemas/ to import from domain and add API-specific fields if needed
Test: pytest tests/ passes, import-linter rules pass
userStories.investigationNotes: Only 4 violations found (not 11). All are schema imports: CharacterGenerationResponse (3 files), SceneGenerationResponse (1 file). Use dependency inversion pattern.

userStories.title: Frontend: Decompose BrainSettingsPage
userStories.description: Split the 2100-line frontend component into 5 focused components.
acceptanceCriteria: Create directory: frontend/src/features/routing/components/panels/
Create ModelConfigPanel.tsx (merge routing rules, constraints, circuit breakers) - ~400 lines extracted
Create TokenAnalyticsPanel.tsx (usage analytics, charts, export) - ~500 lines extracted
Create RealtimeUsagePanel.tsx (live session tracking) - ~120 lines extracted
Create ApiKeyPanel.tsx (provider keys, ollama config) - ~250 lines extracted
Create RagConfigPanel.tsx (RAG settings) - ~190 lines extracted
Update BrainSettingsPage.tsx to import and compose new panels
Add TypeScript interfaces for panel props
Test: npm run typecheck passes, page renders correctly
userStories.investigationNotes: File has 8 logical sections, 2109 lines. Original 3-component split too conservative. Shared state: config, stats, brainSettings, isSaving, date filters.

userStories.title: Domain: Resource & Asset Engine
userStories.description: Create resource and asset entities for world economy foundation.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/contexts/world/domain/value_objects/resource_type.py with ResourceType enum (GOLD, FOOD, MANA, IRON, WOOD, POPULATION, KNOWLEDGE, MILITARY, TRADE_GOODS, CULTURAL_INFLUENCE)
Create src/contexts/world/domain/entities/resource.py with Resource dataclass (resource_id, resource_type, amount, max_capacity)
Create src/contexts/world/domain/value_objects/resource_yield.py with ResourceYield dataclass (resource_type, base_amount, modifier, current_stock)
Create src/contexts/world/domain/value_objects/faction_resources.py with FactionResources value object (faction_id, resources dict)
Update Faction entity to include resources: FactionResources field
Test: Create tests/unit/contexts/world/domain/value_objects/test_resources.py with add/spend scenarios
userStories.investigationNotes: No existing resource models. Create in world context following existing dataclass patterns.

userStories.title: Domain: Territory Control System
userStories.description: Add faction control and resource yields to Location entity.
acceptanceCriteria: Update src/contexts/world/domain/entities/location.py:
- Add controlling_faction_id: str | None = None
- Add contested_by: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
- Add resource_yields: list[ResourceYield] = field(default_factory=list)
- Add territory_value: int = 0 (strategic importance 0-100)
- Add infrastructure_level: int = 0 (development 0-100)
- Add transfer_control(new_faction_id: str) -> Location method
Add domain test for ownership transfer
Test: pytest tests/unit/contexts/world/domain/entities/test_location.py passes
userStories.investigationNotes: Location entity exists with basic structure. Extensions are backward-compatible (nullable fields).

userStories.title: Domain: Diplomacy Matrix Mechanics
userStories.description: Enhance existing DiplomacyMatrix with pact entities.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/contexts/world/domain/entities/diplomatic_pact.py:
- Create PactType enum: TRADE_AGREEMENT, NON_AGGRESSION, ALLIANCE, WAR, CEASEFIRE
- Create DiplomaticPact dataclass: pact_id, faction_a_id, faction_b_id, pact_type, signed_date, expires_date | None, terms (dict)
- Add validation: factions at WAR cannot have TRADE_AGREEMENT
- Add method: is_active(current_date) -> bool
Update DiplomacyMatrix aggregate to include active_pacts: list[DiplomaticPact]
Add method: get_pacts_between(faction_a, faction_b) -> list[DiplomaticPact]
Test: Create test enforcing diplomatic constraints
userStories.investigationNotes: DiplomacyMatrix aggregate already exists. Add pact layer on top. Constraint: War prevents trade.

userStories.title: Domain: Population & Demographics
userStories.description: Add population tracking to Location and aggregation to Faction.
acceptanceCriteria: Update src/contexts/world/domain/entities/location.py:
- Add population_count: int = 0
- Add demographic_breakdown: dict[str, float] = field(default_factory=dict) (race/species -> percentage)
- Add population_growth_rate: float = 0.0
- Add happiness_level: int = 50 (0-100)
Update Faction entity:
- Add property: total_population -> int (sum of controlled locations)
- Add method: calculate_population_from_territories(locations: list[Location]) -> int
Test: Verify population aggregation across multiple controlled locations
userStories.investigationNotes: Basic population fields missing. Aggregation is straightforward sum of controlled locations.

userStories.title: Infrastructure: Robust Event Bus Design
userStories.description: Upgrade EventBus with outbox pattern and priority queuing.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/shared/events/outbox.py:
- OutboxEvent dataclass: event_id, event_type, payload, created_at, processed_at, priority
- EventPriority enum: CRITICAL, HIGH, NORMAL, LOW
- Outbox class with enqueue(), get_pending(), mark_processed() methods
Update src/shared/events/event_bus.py:
- Add enqueue_simulation_event(event, priority) for deferred processing
- Add publish_immediate(event) for real-time events
- Add dead_letter_queue: list[OutboxEvent] for failed events
- Add retry logic with exponential backoff (max 3 retries)
- Ensure one handler failure doesn't crash chain
Test: Verify event ordering, error isolation, dead letter handling
userStories.investigationNotes: Foundation for simulation tick engine. Outbox pattern ensures reliable delivery.

userStories.title: API: World State Snapshot APIs
userStories.description: Create endpoints for geopolitical state queries.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/api/routers/world_state.py:
- GET /world/{world_id}/territories -> TerritoriesResponse (locations with controlling_faction_id)
- GET /world/{world_id}/diplomacy -> DiplomacyMatrixResponse (existing DiplomacyMatrix)
- GET /world/{world_id}/resources -> WorldResourcesResponse (faction resource summary)
Add schemas to src/api/schemas/world_schemas.py:
- TerritoriesResponse, TerritorySummary, DiplomacyMatrixResponse, WorldResourcesResponse
Register router in main_api_server.py
Test: Create tests/api/routers/test_world_state.py

userStories.title: Frontend: Geopolitical Map Base
userStories.description: Visualize territory control on world map.
acceptanceCriteria: Update frontend/src/components/world/LocationTree.tsx:
- Color-code locations by controlling_faction_id (use faction colors or hash-based)
- Add 'Resources' tooltip on hover showing resource_yields
- Add territory_value badge for strategic locations
Create frontend/src/lib/api/worldStateApi.ts:
- useTerritories(worldId) hook
- useWorldResources(worldId) hook
Test: npm run typecheck passes, map renders with colors

userStories.title: Frontend: Diplomacy Matrix Grid
userStories.description: Visualize faction relationships in grid format.
acceptanceCriteria: Create frontend/src/components/world/DiplomacyGrid.tsx:
- 2D grid: rows/columns = factions, cells = relationship color
- Color mapping: ALLIED=green, FRIENDLY=lime, NEUTRAL=yellow, COLD=orange, HOSTILE=red, AT_WAR=dark-red
- Hover: tooltip shows faction names and status
- Click: opens dialog with pact details (if exists)
Update frontend/src/lib/api/worldStateApi.ts:
- useDiplomacyMatrix(worldId) hook
Test: Component renders without data errors

userStories.title: Integration: Chat Session Persistence
userStories.description: Persist chat sessions to database instead of in-memory dict.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/contexts/knowledge/infrastructure/models/chat_session.py (SQLAlchemy model)
Create src/contexts/knowledge/infrastructure/repositories/chat_session_repository.py
Update src/api/routers/brain_settings.py chat endpoint to use repository
Add GET /api/brain/chat/sessions endpoint to list sessions
Add GET /api/brain/chat/sessions/{session_id}/messages endpoint for history
Test: Restart server, verify chat history persists
userStories.investigationNotes: Currently using in-memory dict. Need SQLite/Postgres persistence.

userStories.title: Optimization: Caching Upgrade
userStories.description: Replace simple dict cache with LRU+TTL using cachetools.
acceptanceCriteria: Add cachetools to requirements.txt
Create src/shared/cache/lru_cache.py wrapper with TTL support
Update src/contexts/knowledge/infrastructure/adapters/embedding_generator_adapter.py to use LRU cache
Update heavily accessed query endpoints with caching decorators
Add cache metrics: hits, misses, evictions (logged via structlog)
Test: Verify cache eviction after TTL expires
userStories.investigationNotes: Simple dict cache needs upgrade. Use cachetools.TTLCache with maxsize and ttl parameters.

userStories.title: E2E: Vanguard Stability Check
userStories.description: Comprehensive validation that refactoring didn't break WZ4 features.
acceptanceCriteria: Run full E2E test suite: npm run test:e2e
Run pytest with coverage: pytest --cov=src tests/
Run mypy strict: mypy --strict src/
Run TypeScript check: npm run typecheck
Fix any issues from schema split or model changes
Generate coverage report and verify >70% on modified modules
Document any known issues in scripts/ralph/progress.txt
